non_promotion_rule: Route A is externally source-reviewed as a serious bootstrap/proxy engineering lead only. It is not source-extracted into the corpus, not engineering feasibility, not selected substrate, not prototype-ready, not Formation Medium implementation, not CRBSM implementation, and not investor/corporate language.

reviewed_sources.title: Topolectrical Circuits
supports: topological insulating/semimetallic states in RLC circuits
topological boundary resonances in impedance readout
blocked_inferences: TBRs prove canonical Formation Medium readout

reviewed_sources.title: Topolectrical-circuit realization of topological corner modes
supports: topological boundary resonances in corner impedance profile
explicit caveat that electronic quadrupole moment has no direct classical circuit analogue
blocked_inferences: classical circuit is Formation Medium substrate

reviewed_sources.title: Tunable coupling of transmission-line microwave resonators mediated by an rf SQUID
supports: couplings from about -320 MHz to 37 MHz
near-zero coupling reduces cross transmission by almost four orders
blocked_inferences: tunable coupling equals Formation Medium transport

reviewed_sources.title: Tunable Superconducting Cavity using Superconducting Quantum Interference Device Metamaterials
supports: rf SQUID array metamaterial in superconducting cavity

reviewed_sources.title: Coherent microwave-photon-mediated coupling between a semiconductor and a superconducting qubit
supports: coherent coupling via virtual microwave photons
tunable high-impedance SQUID-array resonator as quantum bus
blocked_inferences: quantum bus equals Formation Medium transport
hybrid qubit coupling proves CRBSM relay

reviewed_sources.title: Tunable Coupling Architecture for Fixed-Frequency Transmon Superconducting Qubits
supports: reported high gate fidelity / calibration stability
blocked_inferences: high-fidelity gates are Formation Medium operations
